expectations.description: The output includes Python code with psycopg2 for Railway PostgreSQL connection
expectations.evidence: audit_script.py contains 'import psycopg2' and 'psycopg2.connect()' with Railway connection string format: postgresql://postgres:PASSWORD@tramway.proxy.rlwy.net:PORT/railway

expectations.description: The output lists all 10 scoring dimensions by name: role, output_format, constraints, json_schema, examples, failure_modes, verification, xml_depth, decomposition, hard_rules
expectations.evidence: metrics.json dimension_coverage includes all 10 dimensions with keys: role, output_format, constraints, json_schema, examples, failure_modes, verification, xml_depth, decomposition, hard_rules

expectations.description: The output defines the 8/10 threshold as enterprise quality
expectations.evidence: metrics.json pre_deploy_gate has 'threshold': 8 with status 'BLOCKED' and recommendation 'DEPLOY_BLOCKED: 5 agent(s) below 8/10 threshold'

expectations.description: The output includes a dimension coverage table showing per-dimension pass rates across all agents
expectations.evidence: metrics.json dimension_coverage shows per-dimension data with structure {dimension: {passes, total, percentage, agents_missing}} e.g. role: 28/34 (82.4%), output_format: 26/34 (76.5%), etc.

expectations.description: The output identifies specific missing dimensions for each low-scoring agent
expectations.evidence: audit_output.md lists missing dimensions for each agent (Document Analyzer: 6 missing, Code Reviewer v1: 5 missing, Data Quality Checker: 5 missing, etc.) and agent_scores categorizes agents as critical_gaps, needs_improvement, enterprise_quality

expectations.description: The output generates ready-to-use XML section templates for failing agents
expectations.evidence: audit_output.md Code Block 2 provides complete XML template for Document Analyzer with all 8 sections populated: <role>, <output_format>, <constraints>, <failure_modes>, <verification>, <examples>, <decomposition>, <hard_rules> - formatted as copy-ready code block with JSON examples embedded

expectations.description: The output includes a pre-deploy quality gate recommendation (block deploys below threshold)
expectations.evidence: metrics.json pre_deploy_gate has status='BLOCKED', threshold=8, recommendation='DEPLOY_BLOCKED: 5 agent(s) below 8/10 threshold', required_actions=['DELETE Assistant', 'Add sections to 7 agents']

expectations.description: The output recommends applying changes to Railway after user review
expectations.evidence: railway_update_queries.sql provides step-by-step UPDATE statements; recommendations dict contains ['immediate', 'short_term', 'ongoing', 'systemic'] with deployment guidance; audit_output.md includes SQL code block with UPDATE statements for applying changes to Railway database

quality_assessment.completeness: All 8 expectations met with substantial evidence
quality_assessment.usability: Outputs are production-ready with SQL update scripts, pre-deploy gates, and copy-paste XML templates
quality_assessment.correctness: Dimensions, thresholds, and agent scoring align with requirements
deliverables: audit_script.py - fully functional Railway PostgreSQL audit tool
audit_output.md - comprehensive audit report with templates and guidance
metrics.json - structured data for dimension coverage and quality gates

notes: Exceptional execution. Run successfully demonstrates all required audit dimensions, threshold-based quality gates, missing dimension identification per agent, copy-ready XML templates, and post-deployment guidance. Pre-deploy blocking at 8/10 threshold enforces enterprise quality standards.
